seoTitle: Clear Island Waters vs Clemant — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clear Island Waters and Clemant. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clear Island Waters vs Clemant: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clear Island Waters and Clemant.
heading: Clear Island Waters vs Clemant — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clear Island Waters, Queensland and Clemant, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clemant has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Clear Island Waters (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clear Island Waters or Clemant safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clear Island Waters has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Clemant scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clear Island Waters scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Clemant scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clear Island Waters or Clemant?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clemant has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
